overview:
## Discussion

Data will be in PKCS #1 format for an RSA key or ANSI X9.63 format for an EC key.

# privateKey

**Instance Property**

The private key of the client.

## Declaration

```swift
let privateKey: Data
```

## Discussion

Data will be in PKCS #1 format for an RSA key or ANSI X9.63 format for an EC key.
